dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes staying in trends despite drawdowns to capture infrequent profitable moves (15-25% of time). Translated using ADX_14 >25 as trend confirmation proxy combined with price/SMA_20 crossover for directional bias. SMA_20 used as primary moving average for trend reversal detection. Stop loss set to 20% per max_acceptable_drawdown_percent parameter. Signal is context-dependent (long/short based on trend direction), so both entry_long/short and exit_long/short are specified. The '75-100% of trend holding' is managed via exit conditions rather than fixed hold_days_max.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes staying in trends despite drawdowns to capture infrequent profitable moves (15-25% of time). Translated using ADX_14 >25 as trend confirmation proxy combined with price/SMA_20 crossover for directional bias. SMA_20 used as primary moving average for trend reversal detection. Stop loss set to 20% per max_acceptable_drawdown_percent parameter. Signal is context-dependent (long/short based on trend direction), so both entry_long/short and exit_long/short are specified. The '75-100% of trend holding' is managed via exit conditions rather than fixed hold_days_max.

source_rule_text: A trend follower must accept trading through unfavorable market periods to avoid missing major trends, because trends occur infrequently (15-25% of the time) and the cost of sitting out is missing the profitable moves.
